sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Piper Sandler Initiates Coverage on STTK with Overweight Rating
feed.summary: Piper Sandler has initiated coverage on Shattuck Labs (STTK) with an "Overweight" rating and a price target of $15.00 USD, a significant increase from previous analyst targets. This new rating suggests a positive outlook for the biotechnology company, which specializes in developing treatments for inflammatory and immune-mediated diseases. While Wall Street analysts have an average target price of $7.25 for STTK, GuruFocus estimates a one-year GF Value of $0.55, indicating a potential downside.

feed.title: BlackRock Changes Indexes, Fees, For 2 iShares Multifactor ETFs
feed.summary: BlackRock has made changes to two of its iShares Multifactor ETFs, LRGF and INTF, by updating their underlying indexes and adjusting their expense ratios. LRGF will now follow the STOXX US Equity Factor Index with a 0.08% expense ratio, and INTF will track the STOXX International Equity Factor Index with a 0.15% expense ratio. These changes aim to enhance the ETFs' ability to capture diverse factor performance at a low cost, providing investors with a transparent and efficient way to integrate factor-based strategies into their portfolios.

feed.title: Air Products’ New NASA Hydrogen Deals And What They Mean For APD Investors
feed.summary: Air Products and Chemicals (NYSE: APD) has secured new contracts with NASA to supply liquid hydrogen for various space programs, including the Kennedy Space Center. These deals emphasize APD's role in critical space infrastructure and align with its strategy of focusing on large, long-term hydrogen projects. While the contracts are seen as a positive development for recurring cash flows and market positioning against competitors like Linde and Air Liquide, investors are advised to monitor how these translate into actual cash generation given analyst concerns about APD's debt and dividend coverage.

feed.title: Assessing Sempra (SRE) Valuation As Recent Share Price Moves Draw Investor Attention
feed.summary: Sempra's recent share price moves have drawn investor attention, with the stock closing at US$86.78. While a popular narrative suggests the company is 13.1% undervalued with a fair value of $99.87 based on future LNG projects, Simply Wall St's DCF model indicates a fair value of $81.42, suggesting it might be slightly overvalued. The article encourages investors to consider both perspectives and conduct their own research, highlighting available tools for valuation.

feed.title: Franklin Q1 Earnings Coming Up: Here's What to Expect From the Stock
feed.summary: Franklin Resources Inc. (BEN) is set to report its first-quarter fiscal 2026 results on January 30, 2026, with analysts anticipating a decline in both earnings and revenues compared to the previous year. Despite favorable market conditions and recent strategic acquisitions like Apera Asset Management and a partnership with Wand AI for AI deployment, the company is predicted to face continued net outflows. The Zacks Consensus Estimate for earnings is 56 cents per share, and for sales, it's $2.15 billion, both indicating year-over-year decreases.

feed.title: Top Wall Street Forecasters Revamp Honeywell Expectations Ahead Of Q4 Earnings
feed.summary: Honeywell International Inc. is set to release its Q4 earnings, with analysts expecting a slight increase in EPS to $2.54 and revenue of $9.92 billion. Several Wall Street analysts have recently adjusted their price targets and ratings for HON, reflecting varied outlooks ahead of the earnings report. The stock closed at $216.64, down 1.9%, the day prior to the article's publication.

feed.title: BLK.SW BlackRock (SIX) +96.87% to CHF 852.85 Jan 29 2026: pre-market catalyst
feed.summary: BlackRock (BLK.SW) stock saw a significant pre-market surge of 96.87% to CHF 852.85 on January 29, 2026, driven by headline news and fixed-income positioning. Despite this strong short-term performance, Meyka AI's forecast suggests a potential 20.34% downside over the next year, projecting a price of CHF 679.45. Investors are advised to watch for the upcoming earnings report on April 10, 2026, and exercise caution due to the stock's premium valuation and volatility.

feed.title: Suburban Propane Partners (SPH) to Release Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Suburban Propane Partners (SPH) is scheduled to release its Q1 2026 earnings before market open on Thursday, February 5th, with analysts anticipating $0.75 EPS and $392.0 million in revenue. The company also declared a quarterly dividend of $0.325 per share, representing an annualized yield of approximately 6.4%. Despite missing estimates in the previous quarter, analysts currently hold a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for the stock.

feed.title: Tesla shares up 1.8% in Frankfurt day after results
feed.summary: Tesla shares experienced a 1.8% increase in Frankfurt following the company's announcement to invest $2 billion in Elon Musk's AI company, xAI. Additionally, Tesla confirmed that production plans for its Cybercab robotaxi are on schedule for the current year. This rise was consistent with aftermarket trading of Tesla's U.S. shares, which had initially seen a larger gain before paring back.

feed.title: Scotiabank Lowers EQT (EQT) PT to $63 While Forecasting Persistent Natural Gas Supply Deficits
feed.summary: Scotiabank has lowered its price target for EQT Corporation (EQT) to $63 from $67, maintaining a Sector Perform rating, while forecasting persistent natural gas supply deficits in North America. This adjustment is part of a bullish outlook on the natural gas sector, with Scotiabank anticipating that fundamental imbalances will drive commodity prices and energy equities higher. Barclays also reduced its price target for EQT to $64, but kept an Overweight rating, noting the resilience of the upstream sector's cash return model despite macroeconomic volatility.

feed.title: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) Given Consensus Rating of "Hold" by Analysts
feed.summary: International Paper Company (NYSE:IP) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from analysts, with an average 12-month price target of $49.07. This comes after the company missed Q3 EPS and revenue expectations, reporting negative net margin and return on equity. Insiders and institutions show diverging activity, with a SVP selling shares and several large institutions like BNY Mellon and Norges Bank increasing their holdings.

feed.title: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) Projected to Post Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) is anticipated to release its Q4 2025 earnings before the market opens on Thursday, February 5, 2026, with analysts forecasting earnings per share of $1.66 and revenue of $2.5076 billion. Wall Street maintains a largely positive outlook for the stock, holding an average "Buy" rating and a consensus target price of $193.50. Recent insider selling activity saw approximately 166,068 shares, valued at around $25.5 million, sold in the last quarter, though insiders still own about 1% of the company.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) to Release Quarterly Earnings on Thursday
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY) is set to release its Q4 2025 earnings before market open on Thursday, February 5th, with analysts expecting $1.65 EPS and $12.2373 billion in revenue. The biopharmaceutical company recently reported strong Q3 earnings, surpassing analyst estimates, and increased its quarterly dividend. Analysts currently rate BMY as "Hold" with a consensus price target of $57.43.

feed.title: Teleflex Incorporated (NYSE:TFX) Receives Consensus Rating of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Analysts have given Teleflex Incorporated (NYSE:TFX) a consensus "Hold" rating based on reports from twelve brokerages, with an average 12-month price target of $141.88. The company recently exceeded quarterly EPS and revenue estimates, reporting $3.67 EPS against an expected $3.38 and revenues of $892.9 million, an increase of 19.4% year-over-year. Teleflex also provided FY2025 EPS guidance between $14.00 and $14.20, slightly above analyst expectations.

feed.title: American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) Given Average Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Analysts
feed.summary: American Tower Corporation (NYSE:AMT) has received an average "Moderate Buy" rating from analysts, with a consensus 12-month price target of $218.79, despite recent price target cuts by several firms. The company beat quarterly EPS and revenue expectations and declared a quarterly dividend of $1.70, resulting in a 3.8% yield, though its dividend payout ratio is high at 108.6%. Company insiders and institutional investors have also made notable transactions in AMT stock recently.

feed.title: Lam Research (LRCX) Poised to Benefit From Expanding Advanced Foundry and NAND Investments
feed.summary: Lam Research Corporation (LRCX) is positioned to benefit from increased investments in advanced foundry and NAND technologies. Analysts from Stifel and RBC Capital have raised price targets and initiated Outperform ratings, respectively, citing Lam Research's strong performance in 2025 where system sales grew over 40%. The company is expected to continue outperforming the overall wafer fabrication equipment (WFE) market in 2026, driven by growth in Advanced Foundry/Logic segments and upgrades in NAND technology.

feed.title: Scotiabank Lowers EQT (EQT) PT to $63 While Forecasting Persistent Natural Gas Supply Deficits
feed.summary: Scotiabank has lowered its price target for EQT Corporation (EQT) to $63 from $67, maintaining a Sector Perform rating, while Barclays also reduced its PT to $64, keeping an Overweight rating. Both firms anticipate persistent natural gas supply deficits in North America, which they believe will drive commodity prices and energy equities higher. EQT Corporation is a natural gas producer in the Appalachian Basin, and analysts advise caution despite the sector's resilient cash return model.

feed.title: Eastman Chemical Company (NYSE:EMN) Receives Average Rating of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: Eastman Chemical Company (NYSE:EMN) has received an average "Hold" rating from analysts, with eight reiterating "hold" and six issuing "buy" recommendations. The average 1-year price target is $78.54. The company recently missed Q4 EPS and revenue estimates but increased its quarterly dividend to $0.84, offering a 4.9% yield.

feed.title: KLA Corporation (KLAC) Gains Analyst Support as Revenue and EPS Forecasts Rise
feed.summary: KLA Corporation (KLAC) has received upgraded ratings and increased price targets from Wells Fargo and Morgan Stanley due to strong growth prospects in the wafer fabrication equipment market. Both firms highlighted KLA's momentum in advanced process technologies like 2nm, 3nm, and 5nm, expecting significant revenue and EPS growth in 2026 and 2027, driven by increased demand for inspection and metrology tools. KLA (KLAC) is a semiconductor equipment company that develops process control and yield management systems.

feed.title: BofA Sees Brex Acquisition Complementing and Expanding Capital One's (COF) Spark Card Offerings
feed.summary: Bank of America analyst Mihir Bhatia lowered Capital One's price target to $280 from $294, maintaining a Buy rating, following the company's Q4 2025 earnings and the announcement of its acquisition of Brex. The firm believes the Brex acquisition will complement and expand Capital One's Spark small business card offerings. Despite an increase in net income and revenue, driven largely by the Discover acquisition, BofA revised its 2025/26 EPS forecasts due to anticipated higher operating expenses.

feed.title: Is Analog Devices (ADI) One of Goldman Sachs' Top Semiconductor Stock Picks?
feed.summary: Analog Devices (ADI) is highlighted as a top semiconductor stock pick by Goldman Sachs. Both TD Cowen and Stifel recently raised their price targets for ADI, citing strong positioning in industrial markets, resilience, and high-performance analog capabilities. The company maintains a healthy gross profit margin and is expected to deliver strong earnings on February 25th, despite a tempered automotive outlook.

feed.title: Verizon (VZ) NYSE pre-market $39.41 on 29 Jan 2026: earnings due tomorrow, what to watch
feed.summary: Verizon (VZ) is trading at $39.41 in pre-market on January 29, 2026, ahead of its earnings report on January 30, 2026, at 08:30 ET. Investors are keen to watch revenue trends, EPS, and guidance, especially given the stock's near 12-month low and attractive 6.93% dividend yield. Meyka AI gives VZ a "HOLD" grade with a 12-month price projection of $43.54, suggesting a 10.48% upside, but highlights high debt as a key risk.

feed.title: The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) Receives Consensus Recommendation of "Hold" from Analysts
feed.summary: The Mosaic Company (NYSE:MOS) has received a consensus "Hold" rating from eighteen brokerages, with an average 12-month target price of $31.50. This comes as the company's shares trade around $28.14, following a recent quarter where EPS beat estimates but revenue missed. Mosaic also announced a quarterly dividend of $0.22, implying a 3.1% yield.

feed.title: Lam Research (LRCX) Poised to Benefit From Expanding Advanced Foundry and NAND Investments
feed.summary: Lam Research (LRCX) is positioned for strong growth, benefiting from expanding advanced foundry and NAND investments. Both Stifel and RBC Capital initiated positive coverage, raising price targets and highlighting the company's outperformance in 2025 and anticipated continued growth in 2026. The analysts noted a shift in growth drivers towards Advanced Foundry/Logic segments and sustained demand for semiconductor manufacturing equipment.

feed.title: CF Industries, POET, and Agricultural Co-Operatives Launch Low-Carbon Fertilizer Pilot
feed.summary: CF Industries, POET, and agricultural co-operatives have initiated a low-carbon fertilizer pilot program to create a sustainable supply chain for ethanol production. This collaboration aims to reduce the carbon intensity of corn grown for ethanol by utilizing low-carbon nitrogen fertilizer. The program highlights the environmental and economic benefits of decarbonizing agricultural inputs and scaling up low-carbon ammonia production.

feed.title: Bristol Myers Squibb (BMY), Microsoft (MSFT) Partner to Enhance Early Lung Cancer Detection Through AI
feed.summary: Bristol Myers Squibb and Microsoft have announced a partnership to improve early lung cancer detection using AI. The collaboration will integrate Bristol Myers' oncology expertise with Microsoft's AI-enabled radiology platform, utilizing FDA-cleared AI algorithms to identify lung nodules. This initiative aims to address healthcare disparities by expanding access to early detection in underserved communities, particularly rural hospitals and community clinics across the US.

feed.title: Broadcom (AVGO) Strengthens Position in AI Compute and Infrastructure Ecosystem
feed.summary: Broadcom (AVGO) is considered a top semiconductor stock by Goldman Sachs and JPMorgan, particularly due to its strong position in the AI compute and infrastructure ecosystem. The company is benefiting from increased capital spending on AI infrastructure and networking technology trends. Goldman Sachs' analysis suggests that Broadcom's collaboration with Google on tensor processing units (TPUs) is significantly narrowing the cost efficiency gap with Nvidia's GPU solutions for AI inference.

feed.title: How Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD) Is Positioning Itself for AI Growth and Server Demand
feed.summary: Advanced Micro Devices (AMD) is being highlighted by analysts like Goldman Sachs, Bernstein, and KeyBanc Capital Markets for its strong position in AI and server demand. Bernstein raised AMD's price target to $225, with analyst Stacy Rasgon noting its AI advancements and anticipating gains from robust server demand. KeyBanc reaffirmed an Overweight rating with a $270 price target, emphasizing strong momentum in server CPUs and high demand from cloud providers.

feed.title: Applied Materials (AMAT) Gains Analyst Support as Multi-Year Semiconductor Tailwinds Take Shape
feed.summary: Applied Materials (AMAT) is receiving strong analyst support, with Goldman Sachs naming it a top semiconductor stock pick. KeyBanc Capital Markets raised its price target to $380, citing AMAT's diversified position and potential gains from increasing deposition and etch intensity in advanced chip manufacturing and conventional DRAM for AI. Barclays also upgraded AMAT to Overweight, projecting a "multi-year earnings tailwind" driven by AI-related spending in the semiconductor industry, noting that concerns about China exposure are already factored into the stock's valuation.

feed.title: Qualcomm (QCOM) Faces Industry Headwinds as It Expands Beyond Smartphones
feed.summary: Qualcomm (QCOM) is navigating industry headwinds despite being a top semiconductor pick by Goldman Sachs. RBC Capital initiated coverage with a "Neutral Sector Perform" rating, noting struggles like slow smartphone sales and Apple's in-house modem development. While Qualcomm seeks to expand into automotive, XR, and IoT, potential market share losses from key clients like Apple and Samsung are expected to temper overall revenue growth in the coming two years.

feed.title: Truist Anticipates Solid PayPal (PYPL) Q4 Results but Warns of Difficult Volume Comparisons
feed.summary: Truist anticipates solid Q4 2025 results for the fintech sector, including PayPal, but analysts warn of difficult year-over-year volume comparisons. Several firms, including Truist, Stephens, and Piper Sandler, have lowered their price targets for PayPal recently, though some expect market sentiment for the Payment and IT Services sector to improve in 2026. The article suggests that despite PayPal's potential, other AI stocks might offer greater upside and less downside risk.

feed.title: Pfizer Inks $530M Deal for Novavax Matrix-M Adjuvant Technology to Boost Vaccine Pipeline
feed.summary: Pfizer has finalized a $530 million non-exclusive licensing agreement with Novavax for its Matrix-M adjuvant technology. This technology, designed to enhance vaccine immune responses, will be used by Pfizer for up to two infectious diseases, with Novavax supplying the adjuvant. The article also highlights positive results from Pfizer's BREAKWATER trial for metastatic colorectal cancer, showing increased response rates with the BRAFTOVI regimen.

feed.title: Costco Wholesale Corporation (NASDAQ:COST) Given Consensus Recommendation of "Moderate Buy" by Brokerages

Institutional investors hold a significant stake in the company.

feed.title: Does Parker-Hannifin’s Dividend and Aerospace Focus Reveal a Deeper Capital Allocation Shift for PH?
feed.summary: Parker-Hannifin has declared a quarterly dividend of US$1.80 per share ahead of its Q2 fiscal 2026 earnings release. Investor focus is on potential growth in the Aerospace Systems and Diversified Industrial segments, particularly after recent acquisitions. The company's premium valuation, high debt, and insider selling contrast with its consistent earnings growth and high returns on equity.

feed.title: Takeda Posts Lower Nine-Month Revenue but Higher Profit, Lifts Dividend and Trims Growth Outlook
feed.summary: Takeda Pharmaceutical Co reported a 3.3% decline in nine-month revenue to ¥3.41 trillion but saw a 2.4% increase in net profit attributable to owners, reaching ¥216.1 billion. The company lifted its full-year dividend to ¥200 per share for fiscal year 2026, while trimming its full-year revenue and Core earnings growth outlook, now expecting slight declines. This revision indicates Takeda's focus on profit resilience and shareholder returns amidst a challenging revenue landscape.

feed.title: POSCO Holdings' 2025 net plunges 46.8 pct on slowdown in construction, battery materials
feed.summary: POSCO Holdings Inc. reported a significant 46.8 percent drop in net profit for 2025, reaching 504.4 billion won (US$354 million). This decline is attributed to one-off losses in the construction sector and a prolonged slump in the rechargeable battery materials market. Despite this, its main steelmaking affiliate POSCO saw improved annual results due to cost reductions and increased sales of high-end products.

feed.title: Intuitive surgical EVP Curet sells $122,500 in shares
feed.summary: Myriam Curet, EVP and Chief Medical Officer at Intuitive Surgical Inc (NASDAQ:ISRG), sold 230 shares of company stock for $122,500 on January 27, 2026, while also exercising options to acquire 230 shares. This transaction followed strong Q4 2025 results for Intuitive Surgical, with revenues of $2.87 billion, surpassing estimates, and several analysts reiterating positive ratings and price targets for the company. The positive outlook is further supported by the anticipated rollout of the da Vinci 5 surgical system.

feed.title: Nvidia Corp. (NVDA) Bernstein Maintains 12 Month Stock Target at $275
feed.summary: Sanford C. Bernstein has reiterated its "Buy" rating and a 12-month price target of $275 for Nvidia Corp. (NVDA), expressing continued confidence in the company's long-term growth. The analysts highlight Nvidia's dominant position in AI accelerators, data center GPUs, and high-performance computing, along with its expanding software ecosystem, as key drivers. Despite potential near-term volatility, any pullbacks are seen as buying opportunities due to Nvidia's strong fundamentals and critical role in global AI infrastructure development.
